_README: Per-creator brand config. The skill writes this on first run by interviewing the creator (see SKILL.md 'First run'). Place the real file at <footage>/.yap_build/brand-config.json or the skill root. yapfull.sh reads it.

_fields.creator: name, for reference
_fields.niche: one line: what the channel is about (drives hook/story framing)
_fields.caption_font: installed font family for word captions (e.g. 'Montserrat Black' default, or a brand display font like 'Bricolage Grotesque ExtraBold')
_fields.label_font: font for the handle/contact block (often a mono, e.g. 'Space Mono')
_fields.handle: on-screen handle at the CTA, e.g. 'YOURNAME.COM'
_fields.contact_lines: extra lines under the handle, e.g. email + site
_fields.cta_clip: OPTIONAL absolute path to a reusable spoken-outro clip; if set, add it as the final clause in each clauses.json

creator: Your Name
niche: one line: what your channel is about
